divergence: The postal service achieved faster-than-light delivery but only for junk mail
story_angle: solemn obituary for a beloved institution nobody can remember the purpose of
headline: Obituary for the Office of Purposeful Dispatch: Last Call for Meaning
deck: In a time where junk mail breaches the speed of thought, we gather to mourn the slow death of relevance.
article: Clerks of the Office of Purposeful Dispatch gathered to record its closure after the Quoian Postmaster-General's Tariff of 1881 routed all legitimate mail through hand couriers. The department's final act was to stamp its own irrelevance certificate in triplicate before the eight-foot doorway flag descended. Postboxes stand empty of anything but circulars. Madame Écriture Platinaire noted that conversations on life and death now require physical delivery. The tariff protects citizens from interstellar junk yet leaves every purposeful envelope stranded behind advertisements that cross the void first. The department's ledgers close with the observation that the wheels of Quoian civilization now turn at the speed of unsolicited offers.
author: Céleste Epistolier, Senior Bureautician of Quoia

weather.condition: Cloudy with a chance of regret

oped.title: Junk Mail's Swift Mercy: Burying Purposeful Dispatch for the Greater Good
oped.author: Sir Reginald Quibble, Perpetual Secretary of the Imperial Society for Unwanted Circulars
oped.body: The Office of Purposeful Dispatch deserves its obituary. At last the post achieves its true destiny: hurtling patent-medicine adverts and land-scheme prospectuses across the æther while genuine letters dawdle like sentimental tortoises. Those who mourn 'relevance' forget that relevance has long been a nuisance, cluttering satchels with declarations of love and demands for payment. Blame the victims' absurdly tall hats, whose brims snag every sober missive and slow the entire service. My remedy is simple: abolish personal correspondence outright and convert every envelope into an advertisement for my own infallible hair tonic. The public will thank me once their minds are unburdened by thought. Progress, after all, is merely the triumph of volume over value, and I, for one, have several crates of volume yet to dispatch.

classifieds.text: To all recipients of the recent deluge of instantaneous circulars: the Office of Purposeful Dispatch tenders its profound apologies, as no meaningful correspondence can now be located beneath the celestial avalanche.

For immediate sale: one gently used ledger of dispatched intentions and three crates of undelivered telegrams, rendered worthless by the new velocity of advertisements. Apply before the junk overtakes the premises.
Wanted: a sober sorter of uncommon fortitude to excavate one genuine letter from each day's thought-speed rubbish heap. Wages paid in remaining fragments of purpose, if any survive.

To the unknown sender of the heartfelt missive posted last Michaelmas: your words arrived at last, yet lie entombed beneath seventeen tons of FTL circulars. Kindly despatch another before relevance itself expires.

panels.caption: "Office of Purposeful Dispatch declares bankruptcy at 9 a.m. FTL circulars now precede every summons."
The postmaster stamps another crate: "Priority. These tonic ads reach the grave before the will is read."
"Excellent. Deliver the obituary tomorrow—it's already obsolete."

joke.setup: With the Office of Purposeful Dispatch now interred, its epitaph already smudged by the faster-than-light catalogues that pass it in the void,
joke.punchline: a gentleman may expect his notice of imminent bankruptcy to arrive before his solicitor’s letter explaining why.
joke.text: With the Office of Purposeful Dispatch now interred, its epitaph already smudged by the faster-than-light catalogues that pass it in the void, a gentleman may expect his notice of imminent bankruptcy to arrive before his solicitor’s letter explaining why.

sponsor_ads.headline: Aetheric Circular Emporium
sponsor_ads.body: Our patented transmuter renders your earnest letters into gaudy prospectuses, ensuring instantaneous delivery across the void whilst genuine intent remains stranded in the ordinary mails.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Meaning not included; semantic reversion voids warranty.

sponsor_ads.headline: Funeral Notices by Luminiferous Post
sponsor_ads.body: Announce the passing of Purposeful Dispatch with our commemorative circulars, which arrive before the deceased has finished dying and linger forever in every parlour.

sponsor_ads.headline: Perpetual Promotional Engine
sponsor_ads.body: A clockwork contrivance that generates fresh junk at superluminal cadence, flooding the empire with offers no soul requested whilst your will and affections travel by cart.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Not liable for ontological fatigue or returned meaning.

sponsor_ads.headline: Office of Purposeful Dispatch: Final Clearance
sponsor_ads.body: Acquire the last remaining meaningful envelopes at ruinous slowness; each is hand-stamped obsolete before departure to remind the recipient that only advertisements now travel without delay.
sponsor_ads.tagline: All sales final; purpose expires upon posting.

stories.headline: Vicomte Mailing LaPresse Reports Quadrupled Print Runs for Circular Stock
stories.deck: Meaningful missives now command a premium of three ha'pennies per envelope
stories.article: Vicomte Mailing LaPresse ran its presses for sixteen straight days to supply intergalactic circular stock after the tariff forced all substantive letters onto courier routes. Nebular ink sales rose in tandem. Directors recorded a quarterly dividend of four and one-half percent, payable only in stamped wrappers.

real_world_echo: Scores feared dead after passenger ferry capsizes off Guyana — mirrored as the capsizing of the final non-junk mail packet, with scores of forgotten purposes feared lost at sea
